summary: FR-DOM-01 Thread Domain Filter A: personal|work domain tag on threads + read-only all|personal|work filtering on /threads and /today. DB: threads.domain text NOT NULL default personal CHECK(personal|work) via hand-written additive migration 0009 (drizzle-kit emitted a table rebuild whose INSERT referenced the not-yet-existing column → replaced with additive ALTER; legacy rows backfill personal, no rebuild). Shared: ThreadDomainSchema; ThreadRow requires domain; CreateThreadRequest.domain optional (server defaults personal); DomainFilterSchema/ThreadListQuerySchema/TodayQuery.domain (default all). Backend: THREAD_ROW_COLUMNS+domain, createThread persists domain, listThreads(db, domain?) where-filter (all keeps order), findThreadIdsByDomain; GET /api/threads?domain (invalid→400); Today route filters dayEvents/twoMinuteTasks/needsReviewEvents/unscheduledEvents/dueTaskSchedulePrompts (watchers=[] threadless) BEFORE feasibility/surface, domain=all=no filter. Frontend: shared DomainFilterControl (3-option, 44px, aria-pressed) on /threads (+card chip) and /today (quiet+live), 개인/업무 selector on /threads/new (default personal), domain chip on /threads/:id header; .domain-seg CSS. Read-only filters mutate nothing; only writes are create + migration. Committed 17b4989.
